parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- Orders summary
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid')) as orders_count,
  ROUND(SUM(total_amount) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid'))::numeric / 100.0, 2) as gmv_eur,
  -- Previous day for delta
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 2 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE - 1) as orders_prev,
  ROUND(SUM(total_amount) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 2 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE - 1)::numeric / 100.0, 2) as gmv_prev,
  -- Payment methods
  ROUND(SUM(total_amount) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND payment_method ILIKE '%card%')::numeric / 100.0, 2) as gmv_card,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND payment_method ILIKE '%card%') as cnt_card,
  ROUND(SUM(total_amount) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND payment_method NOT ILIKE '%card%')::numeric / 100.0, 2) as gmv_balance,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid') AND payment_method NOT ILIKE '%card%') as cnt_balance,
  -- Cancellations
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('cancelled_before_payment','cancelled_after_payment','cancelled')) as cancelled
FROM orders
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE

SELECT
  oi.product_snapshot->>'name' as product,
  COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) as qty,
  ROUND(SUM(oi.total_price)::numeric / 100.0, 2) as revenue_eur
FROM orders o
JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.id
WHERE o.status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid')
  AND o.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND o.created_at < CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY revenue_eur DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Moscow')::int as hour_msk,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('completed','fulfilled','paid')) as orders
FROM orders
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY orders DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
  ymo.id,
  ymo.items_total as amount_kopecks,
  ymo.buyer_info->>'lastName' as city_placeholder,
  ymo.buyer_info->>'region' as region,
  ymo.buyer_info->>'city' as city,
  ymo.status,
  ymo.created_at
FROM yandex_market_orders ymo
WHERE ymo.created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND ymo.created_at < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY amount_kopecks DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  COALESCE(buyer_info->>'region', 'Неизвестно') as region,
  COUNT(*) as orders,
  ROUND(SUM(items_total)::numeric / 100.0, 0) as total_rub
FROM yandex_market_orders
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND created_at < CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY orders DESC
LIMIT 8
